name: HR operations in small to medium-sized accounting firms with 10-50 employees tool
description: For HR operations in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 10-50 employees, overdue compliance training causes regulatory penalties. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR operations in small to medium-sized accounting firms with 10-50 employees
features: Manual entry option for training records
